value.fr: Classifier des images de chiffres manuscrits de type MNIST.

allowed_languages.comment: Language profiles accepted for this project.

default_language.comment: Default language used when no language is explicitly selected.

school_name.comment: School name displayed in the web interface and generated documents.

course_name.comment: Course name displayed in the web interface and generated documents.

student_level.comment: Student level or subtitle displayed in the web interface and generated documents.

roster_xlsx_path.comment: Path to the project roster workbook relative to this project directory.

generated_students_csv.comment: CSV file generated from the project roster and used by the server.

cooldown_seconds.comment: Minimum delay between accepted submissions for one token.

max_zip_size_mb.comment: Maximum uploaded ZIP size in megabytes.

max_file_count_per_zip.comment: Maximum number of entries allowed in one ZIP archive.

max_uncompressed_size_mb.comment: Maximum total uncompressed size accepted from one ZIP archive.

max_output_bytes.comment: Maximum stdout/stderr bytes kept and displayed per stream.

timer_enabled.comment: Enable or disable the teaching-session countdown and submission deadline.

duration_minutes.comment: Duration of the teaching session in minutes when the timer is enabled.

snapshot_directory.comment: Directory where leaderboard snapshots are written, relative to this project directory.

documents_directory.comment: Project-local directory where MAAT stores documents, rosters, tokens and SQLite state.

results_directory.comment: Project-local directory where MAAT writes leaderboards, snapshots and exports.

data_directory.comment: Project data directory relative to this project directory.

support_files.comment: Additional project data files mounted read-only beside the instances.

output_format.comment: Expected final stdout metric line displayed to students.
